scripts.build:wasm: cargo build -p wasm-api --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && mkdir -p public && install -m 0644 ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/wasm_api.wasm public/wasm_api.wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:rules && npm run build:wasm && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.smoke:effects: npm run build && node scripts/smoke-effect-feedback.mjs && node e2e/animation.smoke.mjs
scripts.smoke:animation: cd ../.. && node apps/web/scripts/smoke-bursts.mjs && node apps/web/scripts/smoke-scheduler.mjs && node apps/web/scripts/smoke-presenters.mjs && node apps/web/scripts/smoke-catalog-sweep.mjs
scripts.smoke:e2e: npm run build && node e2e/shell.smoke.mjs && node e2e/seat-label-consistency.smoke.mjs && node e2e/a11y-noleak.smoke.mjs && node e2e/rules-display.smoke.mjs && node e2e/outcome-explanation.smoke.mjs && node e2e/three-marks.smoke.mjs && node e2e/column-four.smoke.mjs && node e2e/draughts-lite.smoke.mjs && node e2e/high-card-duel.smoke.mjs && node e2e/token-bazaar.smoke.mjs && node e2e/secret-draft.smoke.mjs && node e2e/poker-lite.smoke.mjs && node e2e/plain-tricks.smoke.mjs && node e2e/masked-claims.smoke.mjs && node e2e/flood-watch.smoke.mjs && node e2e/frontier-control.smoke.mjs && node e2e/event-frontier.smoke.mjs && node e2e/river-ledger.smoke.mjs && node e2e/briar-circuit.smoke.mjs && node e2e/vow-tide.smoke.mjs && node e2e/blackglass-pact.smoke.mjs && node e2e/animation.smoke.mjs
